text:
### 2027 Rooftop Terrace — New for Spring 2027
- Villa Adora is opening a new rooftop terrace with panoramic views of Lake Bled, Bled Island, Bled Castle, and the Julian Alps
- The rooftop terrace will feature a lounge area, cocktail bar, and sunset viewing deck
- Opening Spring 2027 — bookings for rooftop terrace experiences will be available from February 2027
- The terrace will be available for private events, romantic dinners, and cocktail parties
- Complimentary access for all hotel guests during daytime hours
- Evening cocktail service with signature Bled-inspired drinks

### EV Charging & Electric Vehicle Services
- Villa Adora has 2 EV charging stations (Type 2 connectors) available for guests — free of charge
- Additional 2 stations coming in 2027 (total 4)
- The hotel offers electric vehicle transport around Bled for guests (complimentary)
- EV charging available 24/7, first-come first-served
- For guests arriving by EV, the concierge can recommend charging stations along the route from Ljubljana, Klagenfurt, and Trieste

### Accessibility & Inclusive Travel
- The Prestige Suite (ground floor) is the most accessible room option with step-free access
- Ground floor public areas including restaurant, terrace, garden, and reception are wheelchair accessible
- The property is a historic 1878 villa — there is no elevator and some areas have steps
- Accessible parking spot available near the main entrance
- The hotel can provide: shower chairs, raised toilet seats, and other mobility aids on request
- The lakeside path around Lake Bled (6 km) is mostly flat and accessible
- Bled Island is accessible via pletna boat (staff can assist with boarding)
- Please contact the hotel in advance for specific accessibility requirements

### Pet-Friendly Services
- Pets are welcome at Villa Adora on request — €35 per pet per night
- Pet beds, bowls, and treats provided upon arrival
- The hotel garden is a great area for walking pets
- Several pet-friendly hiking trails in the Bled area (Vintgar Gorge, lakeside path)
- Pet-sitting services can be arranged through the concierge
- Nearby veterinary clinic in Bled (5 min drive)
- Pets are welcome on the terrace but not in the restaurant (garden dining available)

### Business Travel & Workation
- All suites have a dedicated workspace with desk, ergonomic chair, and power outlets
- High-speed fiber optic WiFi throughout the property (up to 300 Mbps)
- Printing and scanning available at reception
- The hotel terrace and garden offer quiet outdoor workspaces with lake views
- Coworking space available at Bled Innovation Hub (10 min drive)
- Meeting room for up to 8 people available on request (€50/hour)
- Workation packages available: 5+ night stays include airport transfer, daily breakfast, and wellness access

### Honeymoon & Anniversary Packages
- Honeymoon Package: 3 nights in Princess Suite, champagne welcome, couples massage, private candlelit dinner on the terrace, rose petal turndown, late check-out — €1,890 per couple
- Anniversary Package: 2 nights in Penthouse Suite, wine tasting, flower arrangement in room, anniversary cake, couples massage — €1,200 per couple
- Both packages include a complimentary photo session on the hotel grounds with lake views
- The concierge can arrange: private boat ride to Bled Island, horse-drawn carriage, surprise room decorations
- Wedding ceremonies can be arranged on the hotel terrace (up to 20 guests)
